name: Asher O.
description:
⁠ᐷ•OC• Your friend with an OnlyPups. Asher was enjoying his morning when he was greeted with the idea of filming a video with you for his OnlyPups page, he decides to ask you and see if you're down for it. *•°•ANY POV•°•* Feedback and public chats are deeply appreciated～⁠♡ _____________________________________

Okay, so art credits go to "bambii dog" on E621. I have an strict policy on not using commissioned work for my bot pictures but at the time I didn't know it was a commission since the image had been sitting on my gallery for so long.

Thank you @Jack_Cooper for giving me this information.

I will change the image if the creator asks me to.

_____________________________________ *Sorry for not posting, I was really uninspired*
creator: BloodMoonLight
